# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-06-14)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Structural barriers and facilitators of accessing rehabilitation among adults aged 50 years and older with low back pain: a scoping review of the literature.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik structural barriers and facilitators of accessing rehabilitasyon among adults aged 50 years and older with bel ağrısı: a scoping review of the literature. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc health services research. 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: structural, barriers, facilitators, accessing, rehabilitasyon, among.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42286624/

### Dysmenorrhea patients' experience with work productivity impact and treatment in Japan.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik dysmenorrhea patients' experience with work productivity impact and treatment in japan. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc women's health. 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: dysmenorrhea, patients, experience, work, productivity, impact.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42286607/

### Photon-counting CT for paraspinal muscle fat quantification compared with MRI proton density fat fraction.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik photon-counting ct for paraspinal muscle fat quantification compared with mri proton density fat fraction. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc medical imaging. 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: fat, photon, counting, paraspinal, muscle, quantification.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42286523/

### Biochemical and microenvironmental characterization of the disc-vertebra complex in non-specific low back pain using non-fat-saturation multi-slice CEST MRI.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik biochemical and microenvironmental characterization of the disc-vertebra complex in non-specific bel ağrısı using non-fat-saturation multi-slice cest mri. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: european spine journal : official publication of the european spine society, the european spinal deformity society, and the european section of the cervical spine research society. 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: european, spine, society, non, biochemical, microenvironmental.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42286353/

### Effectiveness of telerehabilitation in managing chronic low back pain: a pragmatic randomized controlled non-inferiority trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effectiveness of telerehabilitasyon in managing chronic bel ağrısı: a pragmatic randomize controlled non-inferiority klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: international journal of medical informatics. 2026 jun 10. Anahtar kavramlar: effectiveness, telerehabilitasyon, managing, chronic, low, back.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42284831/

### [Non-invasive neuromodulation for chronic pain : A review of eight current methods and the evidence].
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik [non-invasive neuromodulation for chronic ağrı : a review of eight current methods and the evidence]. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: schmerz (berlin, germany). 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: non, invasive, neuromodulation, chronic, ağrı, review.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42283853/

### Performance of large language models in interpreting evidence-based clinical guidelines for lumbar disc herniation with radiculopathy.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik performance of large language models in interpreting evidence-based clinical guidelines for lomber (bel bölgesi) disc herniation with radiculopathy. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: european spine journal : official publication of the european spine society, the european spinal deformity society, and the european section of the cervical spine research society. 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: european, spine, society, performance, large, language.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42283816/

### Lumbosacral spondylodiscitis following superior hypogastric nerve block performed during uterine artery embolization: a case report.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik lumbosacral spondylodiscitis following superior hypogastric nerve block performed during uterine artery embolization: a case report. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: cvir endovascular. 2026 jun 12. Anahtar kavramlar: lumbosacral, spondylodiscitis, following, superior, hypogastric, nerve.
